title: BadmintonForehandClearRAGSource
description: Source catalog record. The primary key is 'id' (e.g., S05); chunk.source_ids reference this id. evidence_level here is the SOURCE-level fine-grained label (as in badminton_forehand_clear_sources.csv); evidence_layer ties it to the coarse CHUNK-level vocabulary used by rag_chunk.schema.json.

id.description: Stable primary key, e.g., S05. chunk.source_ids reference this. Pattern allows S100+.

legacy_id.description: Corresponding rag_project legacy string id (e.g., CLEAR_SORENSEN). See source_id_crosswalk.csv. Empty if no mapping.

year.description: Year as string. Allows 'n.d.' and ranges like '2010/2011'; do NOT change to integer.

evidence_level.description: SOURCE-level fine-grained label (free text matching sources.csv), distinct from the coarse chunk evidence layer.

evidence_layer.description: Coarse evidence layer this source maps to; same vocabulary as chunk.evidence_level. Bridges source label and chunk layer.

content_hash.description: sha256 of fetched artifact, for reproducibility/version pinning.
